author: Tamsyn Kitto
content:
Had two fantastic breakfast baps and wonderful oat milk lattes 
Then treated ourselves to the ice creams!

Absolutely wonderful 
Amazing friendly staff 

Please go and support this lovely family run cafe 
With wonderful  view over St. Ives Bay up on the hill, away from the hustle bustle of St. Ives town… bonus to be be open on Sundays 

You won’t be disappointed 😁
